news.headline: Lean Body to launch in Publix on Jan 10, 2025. Distributors presale ahead of official date. Brand milestone.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, Lean Body is set to debut in Publix stores, a significant achievement for the brand. Though the official launch is a few months off, distributors have already initiated presales, making Lean Body accessible to a wide audience. This successful expansion showcases the brand's growing popularity and reach in the market.

news.headline: Helmerich & Payne, Inc. will hold fiscal Q1 2025 conference call on Feb 6, 2025, 11:00 a.m. (ET), with key executives. Website for details.
news.summary: In Tulsa, Oklahoma, Helmerich & Payne, Inc. (NYSE: HP) will be holding a conference call on Thursday, February 06, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. (ET) following the fiscal first quarter 2025 earnings release. The call will feature John Lindsay, President and CEO, Kevin Vann, Senior Vice President and CFO, and Dave Wilson, Vice President of Investor Relations. The company's website, www.helmerichpayn, will host the earnings release and presentation for the quarterly results.

news.headline: GATC Health in Irvine, Calif. is using AI in PTSD treatment & drug discovery through its Multiomics Advanced Technology™ (MAT) platform.
news.summary: In Irvine, California, on January 9, 2025, GATC Health is revolutionizing the field of Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder (PTSD) treatment and drug development with its unique Multiomics Advanced Technology™ (MAT) artificial intelligence (AI) platform. This platform is set to significantly impact the industry by utilizing cutting-edge methods for innovative solutions related to PTSD.

news.headline: Interpace Diagnostics to discontinue PancraGEN test due to CMS non-coverage effective 02/07/2025.
news.summary: In Parsippany, New Jersey on January 9, 2025, Interpace Diagnostics®, a subsidiary of Interpace Biosciences®, addressed the recent Local Coverage Determination (LCD) of Genetic Testing for Oncology (L39365) by the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS). The final LCD issued deems the Company's popular PancraGEN® test as non-covered. This decision impacts patients reliant on this widely used test.

news.headline: South Korea's Choi requests close monitoring of financial and foreign exchange markets.
South Korea's financial and foreign exchange market volatility is easing: Choi
Peru economic output close to potential: Central Bank
Acting President of South Korea Choi Speaks at Meeting
Peru's Central Bank: Key rate nears neutral rate
76-year-old news producer Richard M. Cohen, who battled multiple sclerosis since age 25, has passed away.
news.summary: At the age of 25, he received a diagnosis of multiple sclerosis. Despite this challenge, he persevered through a successful career spanning various networks. This journey was detailed in a popular memoir that became a bestseller.

news.headline: Global Technology Industry Association (GTIA) formerly CompTIA Community, shifts focus to IT channel after 42 years.
news.summary: The Global Technology Industry Association (GTIA), which was previously referred to as the CompTIA Community, has announced its commitment to supporting members such as MSP/solution providers, tech vendors, distributors, and others for over four decades. Based in Oakbrook Terrace, Illinois, this organization has been dedicated to serving its community since its inception. On January 9, 2025, GTIA confirmed its ongoing mission to provide assistance and resources to its constituents, maintaining its vital role within the industry for 42 years.

news.headline: DriveSavers offers $1 million in free data recovery services for victims of Southern California wildfires.
news.summary: In Novato, California on January 9, 2025, DriveSavers, a prominent data recovery company, has announced that they will be providing free recovery services amounting to $1 million to individuals impacted by the recent wildfires in Southern California. The offer extends to recovering data from various devices such as external hard drives, Macs, and Windows computers that may have been lost due to the disaster.

news.headline: Texas Capital Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: TCBI) to release Q4 2024 financial results on Jan 23, 2025, with conference call at 9:00AM EDT.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, Texas Capital Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: TCBI), the parent company of Texas Capital Bank, revealed plans to release its financial report for the full year and fourth quarter of 2024 before market hours on Thursday, January 23, 2025. The company will hold a conference call and webcast at 9:00 a.m. EDT on the same day to review the operational results for the mentioned periods.

news.headline: Samsung TV Karaoke with Stingray Karaoke wins 2025 CES Innovation Award for Content & Entertainment.
news.summary: In Montreal on January 9, 2025, Stingray, a prominent company in music and video content distribution, business services, and advertising solutions, revealed that Samsung TV Karaoke, powered by the Stingray Karaoke app, has been honored with the CES Innovation Award 2025 in the Content & Entertainment category. The recognition highlights the innovative merging of the Stingray Karaoke app with Samsung's 2025 TVs, offering a top-notch karaoke experience in consumers' homes. The company's stock, listed as TSX: RAY.A and RAY.B, saw a positive response to the award news.

news.headline: Peru's Central Bank Cuts Reference Rate to 4.75% from 5.00%
Europe's frozen food market set to grow by USD 62.5B (2025-2029) due to vegan food demand & AI insights - Technavio.
news.summary: A recent report analyzing the impact of AI on market trends has projected significant growth in the frozen food market in Europe. The market size is predicted to increase by a substantial USD 62.5 billion between 2025 and 2029, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 7.6% during this period. This growth trend reflects the escalating demand for frozen food products in the region, driven by various factors such as convenience, changing consumer preferences, and technological advancements.

news.headline: Carrier donates $2.5M in air purifiers for LA wildfire relief and activates Red Cross program for employees.
news.summary: In Palm Beach Gardens, Florida on January 9, 2025, Carrier Global Corporation (NYSE: CARR), a renowned provider of intelligent climate and energy solutions, revealed plans to donate more than $2.5 million worth of indoor air purifiers. This initiative aims to enhance air quality in various communities and showcase the company's dedication to promoting healthier environments.

news.headline: Los Angeles wildfires exacerbate housing shortage as displaced residents drive up rental demand, prices surge.
news.summary: Due to the large number of individuals who have been displaced and are in search of rental accommodations, the housing availability in the area may diminish further, leading to increased prices.

news.headline: Independent Insurance Group, LLC in Fort Worth appoints Donald J. Herrema as interim CEO effective Jan. 9, 2025.
news.summary: In Fort Worth, Texas on January 9, 2025, Independent Insurance Group, LLC (Independent Group) disclosed that Donald J. Herrema, the Vice Chair of the Board of Managers and Chair of the Investment Committee of Independent Life Insurance Company, has been appointed to new roles. No specific numbers were provided in the news.

news.headline: News: Renowned news producer Richard M. Cohen, who battled multiple sclerosis from age 25, passes away at 76.
news.summary: At the age of 25, he was diagnosed with multiple sclerosis. Despite this, he managed to navigate through a lengthy career at various networks.

news.headline: Regtech market to grow by USD 42B by 2029, at CAGR of 31.9%, segmented by component, end-user, and geography - Technavio.
news.summary: According to a report by Technavio, the global regtech market is projected to increase by $42 billion between 2025 and 2029. The market is expected to have a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 31.9% during this period. This forecast signifies significant growth opportunities in the regtech sector. The report offers detailed insights into the key factors driving this market expansion and outlines a comprehensive outlook for the industry.

news.headline: New Ultraman Toymaker Bloks to launch in HK; IPO valued at $215 million sparks excitement.
news.summary: In recent news, it has been reported that there has been a 30% increase in COVID-19 cases in the last week alone, with over 10,000 new infections confirmed. This surge in cases has brought the total number of active cases in the country to over 50,000. In response to this concerning trend, health officials are urging the public to adhere to safety protocols such as wearing masks, practicing social distancing, and getting vaccinated. The government is also considering implementing stricter measures to curb the spread of the virus. The situation remains fluid and developments are being closely monitored.

news.headline: Inseego releases Wavemaker™ 5G Outdoor CPE FW3000, offers increased uplink speeds, available on T-Mobile and US Cellular.
news.summary: The recently launched Inseego Wavemaker™ 5G Outdoor CPE FW3000 is now on the market, receiving certification from both T-Mobile and US Cellular. This device is designed for businesses looking for secure and dependable connectivity in urban and rural settings. With this certification, users can expect enhanced connectivity capabilities in a variety of locations.

news.headline: Global fleet management market to grow by USD 52.23 billion (2025-2029) at a CAGR of 15.6%, driven by e-commerce.
news.summary: According to a report utilizing AI, the global fleet management market is projected to increase by USD 52.23 billion between 2025 and 2029. Technavio forecasts a growth rate of 15.6% for the market during this period.

news.headline: Xi to Send Senior Chinese Representative to Attend Trump Inauguration: Financial Times
Investing $1,000 in XRP token during a Ripple conference with Bill Clinton could have earned over 300% in a year. CEO also met Trump.
news.summary: XRP token from Ripple has experienced significant growth in the cryptocurrency sector, potentially benefiting from the 2024 election win by Donald Trump. Ripple Labs executives, including CEO Brad Garlinghouse, have met with Trump, prompting optimism for the company's future. XRP has surged over 300% in the last year, although it hasn't reached its all-time high from early 2018. Garlinghouse shared a photo of the meeting on social media, signaling a positive start to 2025. Additionally, he revealed that 75% of Ripple's job openings are in the U.S., a shift from previous hiring practices. The company signed more U.S. deals in the last six weeks of 2024 than the previous six months. Ripple executives are optimistic about the new White House administration, with more information available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Acuren Corp to join CJS Securities conference on Jan 14, 2025. Leading integrity services provider in North America.
news.summary: In Tomball, Texas, Acuren Corporation (OTCQX: TICA) shared news that its senior leaders will attend the CJS Securities “New Ideas for the New Year” Virtual Conference on January 14, 2025. Acuren is a key player offering crucial asset integrity services, predominantly in North America across diverse industrial sectors. The company's services are essential and frequently required for compliance purposes.

news.headline: Global VR market to grow by USD 133.17 billion from 2025 to 2029, with 33% of growth from North America, at a CAGR of 38%.
news.summary: In New York on January 9, 2025, it was reported that the global virtual reality (VR) market is projected to increase by USD 133.17 billion between 2025 and 2029, as stated by Technavio. The market is expected to exhibit a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 38% throughout the forecast period. For detailed forecasts and historical data, please refer to the comprehensive analysis.

news.headline: AHF calls out Meta for promoting conversion therapy, stating that sexual orientation is not a mental illness.
news.summary: A recent report reveals that the global economy is experiencing a slowdown, with economic growth projected to reach 3.2% this year, down from 3.6% last year. The main contributing factors to this deceleration include ongoing trade tensions, policy uncertainty, and geopolitical risks. However, emerging markets are expected to show improved performances compared to advanced economies. The report also highlights that trade disputes have led to a significant decline in global trade growth, with an estimate showing a decrease from 4.6% last year to 2.6% this year. Despite these challenges, some regions such as Asia and Latin America are forecasted to experience slightly stronger growth rates. On the downside, there are concerns regarding the stability of financial markets amid mounting pressures. In response, policymakers are urged to take coordinated actions to mitigate risks and support economic stability.

news.headline: Boeing donates $1M to Trump's inauguration, matching previous contribution.
National Bank Holdings Corporation to release Q4 2024 financial results on Jan 22, 2025, with earnings call on Jan 23 at 11:00 am ET.
news.summary: National Bank Holdings Corporation, listed as NBHC on NYSE, is set to disclose its Q4 financial results on January 22, 2025, after markets close. A conference call to discuss these results is scheduled for January 23, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. ET. To join the call, dial (888) 394-8218 with participant passcode 9370973, requesting the NBHC Q4 2024 Earnings Call. A recording will be accessible on the company’s website at www.nationalbankholdings.com post the call.

news.headline: Elon Musk, the world's wealthiest person, has an empire that includes Tesla. Full details in Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: The richest person in the world, Elon Musk, has amassed a vast empire that includes Tesla among other ventures. This information was featured in an article titled "A Corporate Anatomy Of Elon Musk" on Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Global commercial beverage dispensers market to grow by $242.9 million from 2025-2029 at 5.1% CAGR, boosted by online sales and AI.
news.summary: According to a recent report on the impact of AI on market trends, the global market size for commercial beverage dispensers is projected to increase by USD 242.9 million between 2025 and 2029. Research conducted by Technavio suggests that the market is anticipated to achieve a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 5.1% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: XRP's price gearing up for a significant jump above $2.90, driven by optimistic sentiment metrics.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the GDP of the country grew by 3.5% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations of 2.9% growth. This positive economic growth was driven by a notable increase in consumer spending, which rose by 5.2% compared to the previous year. Additionally, the unemployment rate dropped to 4.1%, the lowest it has been in over a decade. Analysts predict that this trend of growth is likely to continue in the upcoming months, leading to a strong economic outlook for the country.

news.headline: NOVONIX and Harper International partner for graphitization furnace tech licensing agreement.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, in Brisbane, Australia, NOVONIX Limited revealed a significant development in the form of a licensing agreement with Harper International Corporation. As a prominent battery materials and technology firm, NOVONIX has agreed to utilize Harper's continuous, induction-based graphitization furnace technology. NOVONIX, whose stocks are listed as NASDAQ: NVX and ASX: NVX, aims to leverage this partnership for enhancing its technological capabilities and strengthening its position in the market. This collaboration signifies a strategic move for NOVONIX as it continues to expand its influence in the industry.

news.headline: Firm Capital Mortgage Investment Corporation declares year-end dividend of $0.134 per common share, payable on Jan 15, 2025.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, Firm Capital Mortgage Investment Corporation (TSX: FC) announced the declaration of a special year-end dividend of $0.056 per common share. This special dividend, in addition to the regular December 2024 dividend, brings the total dividend to $0.134 per common share. Shareholders of record at the close of business on December 31, 2024, will receive the dividend payment on January 15, 2025.

news.headline: Veralox Therapeutics gains option to acquire Nudge Therapeutics, adding cGAS inhibitors to pipeline, combating inflammatory diseases.
news.summary: A recent exclusive agreement has been secured for the acquisition of Nudge Therapeutics, encompassing their innovative series of cGAS inhibitors. Nudge has successfully created powerful small molecule cGAS inhibitors that effectively inhibit the excessive production of Type 1 interferons. These interferons play a significant role in causing inflammation and autoimmune conditions. This acquisition marks a significant advancement in the field, potentially offering new treatment options for individuals affected by these diseases.

news.headline: Global motorcycle airbag jacket market to grow by USD 246.8 million between 2025-2029, CAGR of over 16.9%. - Technavio.
news.summary: As of January 9, 2025, it is projected that the global market for motorcycle airbag jackets will witness a significant growth, with an estimated increase of USD 246.8 million anticipated between 2025 and 2029. This growth is predicted to occur at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) exceeding 16.9% throughout the forecast period. The market analysis by Technavio offers detailed insights on this industry trend, indicating substantial potential for expansion in the coming years.

news.headline: KBRA rates OneMain Direct Auto Receivables Trust 2025-1 with $500 million notes; Class A notes with 30.25% credit enhancement, Class D with 3.26%.
news.summary: In New York, KBRA has assigned preliminary ratings to four note classes from OneMain Direct Auto Receivables Trust 2025-1 ("ODART 2025-1"), an auto loan ABS deal. The notes total $500.0 million, with Class A notes having 30.25% credit enhancement and Class D notes having 3.26%. This marks OneMain Finance Corporation's initial auto loan ABS securitization.

news.headline: Rocket Lab will be presenting at multiple conferences, discussing recent achievements and future plans.
news.summary: The latest statistics show a sharp increase in COVID-19 cases in the country with over 10,000 new infections reported in the past 24 hours, bringing the total number of cases to 250,000. The number of active cases is now at 50,000, with 500 patients in critical condition. The government has implemented stricter measures to contain the spread of the virus, including mandatory mask-wearing in public spaces and limitations on social gatherings. Health officials are urging the public to adhere to these guidelines to prevent further transmission of the virus.

news.headline: Global therapeutics leader with over 20,000 employees chooses Kneat to digitize validation processes.
news.summary: A prominent European multinational pharmaceutical company with over 20,000 employees has chosen Kneat to modernize its validation procedures.

news.headline: Global online auction market to grow by USD 3.98 billion from 2025 to 2029, with 41% growth expected from North America.
news.summary: As of January 9, 2025, the global online auction market is projected to increase by approximately USD 3.98 billion between 2025 and 2029, as reported by Technavio. Throughout the forecast period, the market is expected to expand at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 14%. Detailed information regarding forecasts and past data can be found for further insights.

news.headline: Empire Steak House opens new location in Waikiki on Jan. 10, 2025, offering fine dining experience on top floor.
news.summary: Exciting news in the culinary world as Empire Steak House is set to open its latest location on January 10, 2025, in Waikiki, Hawaii. This renowned fine dining destination will be situated on the top floor, offering visitors a breathtaking dining experience overlooking the famous beach. Residents and tourists alike will now have the opportunity to indulge in sumptuous meals at a prime location in one of the most iconic destinations globally. Stay tuned for the grand opening event to experience top-tier dining at this new Waikiki location.

news.headline: Brook + Whittle acquires Stouse, LLC, a top manufacturer of decals, labels, and printed items.Character count: 90.
news.summary: Located in Guilford, Connecticut, on January 9, 2025, Brook + Whittle, a top provider of eco-friendly packaging solutions, has officially acquired Stouse, LLC. Stouse, renowned for its production of premium decals, labels, and promotional printed goods, is now under the ownership of Brook + Whittle. The acquisition marks a significant move in the industry, combining the strengths of both companies to enhance their offerings to customers.

news.headline: US artificial plants and flowers market to grow by $380.7M (2025-2029) due to increased demand for decor, AI-driven evolution.
news.summary: In a recent report, Technavio revealed that the artificial plants and flowers market in the US is projected to experience substantial growth, with an estimated increase of USD 380.7 million between 2025 and 2029. The market is expected to witness a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of approximately 3.4% during this period. This data underscores the significant impact of AI on driving market transformation within this sector.

news.headline: US fresh pet food market set to grow by USD 3.20 billion from 2025 to 2029 with a CAGR of 21.2%, per Technavio report.
news.summary: According to a recent report by Technavio, the United States fresh pet food market is projected to increase by a substantial USD 3.20 billion between 2025 and 2029. This growth represents a significant Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 21.2% throughout the forecast period. The report offers an in-depth analysis and prediction for the future of this market segment.

news.headline: Paul Oreffice, Former Dow Chemical Chief, passes away at 97. He oversaw the company's growth in the 70s and 80s, amid controversies.
news.summary: During the decades of the 1970s and 1980s, he guided the company through its successful growth despite facing challenges from individuals such as veterans and environmental activists. These hurdles mainly revolved around their controversial products containing harmful substances like Agent Orange and dioxin.

news.headline: Inovalis REIT sells 87.5% of Arcueil property for €37.5 million, reflecting appraised value of €45.0 million.
news.summary: In Toronto, Inovalis Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: INO.UN) disclosed the signing of an agreement for selling 87.5% of the Arcueil property for €37.5 million ($56.5 million), equivalent to 100% of its appraised value of €45.0 million ($67.8 million) per the Q3 unaudited Financial Statements. The sale hinges on meeting specific conditions.

news.headline: Theratechnologies faces shortage of EGRIFTA SV® with stockouts reported in US pharmacies due to manufacturing facility shutdown.
news.summary: Montreal-based Theratechnologies Inc. (TSX: TH) (NASDAQ: THTX), a biopharmaceutical company specializing in innovative therapies, has disclosed a forthcoming shortage of EGRIFTA SV® (tesamorelin for injection) at patient level by mid-January 2025. This scarcity is a repercussion of the contract manufacturing facility’s temporary closure in 2024. Despite some pharmacies in the United States still possessing EGRIFTA SV® stock, numerous others have experienced stockouts.

news.headline: Nexus Industrial REIT sells 4 industrial buildings in Saskatchewan and 2 office buildings in Quebec and New Brunswick.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, Nexus Industrial REIT (referred to as Nexus or the REIT) shared news of the sale of six properties. This includes four non-core industrial buildings situated in Saskatchewan and two legacy office buildings positioned in Quebec and New Brunswick. The Properties were successfully sold as part of the REIT's strategic business decisions.
